privileged_info_summary: The task involves a synthetically-generated ODT document created by Python code in setup_task.sh using the odfpy library. The source document contains real organization names (Maricopa County Department of Public Health and Arizona Department of Health Services are real organizations) but uses fictional phone numbers (602-555-xxxx pattern is standard for fictional US numbers) and a fictional character (Dr. Elena Sandoval-Cruz). However, three critical metadata claims about minimum replacement counts are factually incorrect: 'Arizona Department of Health Services' appears 6 times, not the claimed 10; 'State Epidemiology and Response Division' appears 4 times, not the claimed 5; and '(602) 555-0147' appears 3 times, not the claimed 4. The header text claim is also incomplete—the instructions specify 'MARICOPA COUNTY – CONFIDENTIAL' but metadata claims only 'MARICOPA COUNTY'.
